text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm walking around town on my day off, when...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Ooh, this one's nice and light! Hm... How
about we get this?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well... I dunno. Maybe we should stick to
something more... current.
choice_data_list: What are you two up to?
What are you two up to?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ack! Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hello! We're thinking of getting a present for
Maruzensky. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Well, you see, Maruzensky's talk show, Gnarly☆Gossip Time ♪ will be starting in a bit!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's a really popular program, and today is
actually her 134th time hosting it! By the way,
this is her fourth time at this venue...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
She invited us to come and watch, and Chiyono O
suggested we should get some kinda present to
thank her!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I figured with Curren by my side, we'd be able to
find a great gift for sure! She knows all the trends
on Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Thank you. ♪ But to me, a good present
should—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oooh?! Is that Chiyo and Curren I see?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wait, if Chiyono O is here, that must mean... Are
you two going to Maruzen's event?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: We are! Are you guys going as well, Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We wanted to get a gift for Maruzen
before we headed over, though.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, we're doing the same! This shop seems to
match her style well!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ah! But if we all buy things here, won't we just end
up giving her similar presents?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Then how about we get her what we want to give her instead of what we think she'll like?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
What I want to give her... What I want to give
her...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I know! How about some croquettes?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's just what you wanna eat!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But now that I think about it... I would love to give Maruzen a taste of the delicious food from my hometown!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Wait for me, Tickezo! Off to the Hokkaido Fair
we gooo!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Th-that was fast! I guess they both had something
in mind!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
You do too, don't you? Let's choose what we
wanna give her. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What?! But this is so difficult!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
We're talking about Maruzen here. I can't imagine
her liking something I choose...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Is she the kind of person who'd complain about a
heartfelt present?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sh-she would never!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She's nice to everyone—even me! Obviously, she
would treasure the thought behind the gift far
more than the item itsel—

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh! I know what I want to give her!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aha, so you did have an idea!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I do! There's something I received long ago that
made me very happy.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I decided against it at the time, 'cause I thought it
would be too presumptuous a gift, but... I think
I'll give it to her after all!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh! Is this... a cherry blossom key chain?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Y-yes! I thought the traditional design with that
decorative cord looked really cute...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: And, um... Actually, I have the same one...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh my! Really?! We're twins, then!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry for giving you a matching key chain out of
nowhere! Feel free to throw it away if you think
it's weird!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I'd never throw it away. I'm so grateful for
the thought you put into this, Chiyo! Thanks. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...I don't think she's realized it herself, but
Chiyono O's a pretty passionate person, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Sakura Chiyono O manages to summon
the courage to give a present to her idol.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Gasp! You're right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
She talked about what she's been up to in a
recent interview! There might be a hint about
what she wants in my notes!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! You really crammed a lot of info into that!
Are those all notes on Maruzen?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I take notes about everything I think is
important.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wow... The words are so tightly packed in there, I
wouldn't be surprised if you copied down
everything she's ever said.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I can see why you would think that... Oh, here it is! Here are my notes on the latest issue of Umazing Trends Monthly !

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... "Tired," "vacation in Atami," "wearing
down," "modern massage chairs"...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Umm... Is that some kind of code?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I got it! I know what to get her!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ooh, a set of bath bombs! Thank you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I've been really stiff lately, so I've been wanting
to find a way to relax! I'm so happy to receive
these! ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... ♪ I'm just happy you're happy.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Nothing soothes my tired soul more than
your lovely smile, though, Chiyo. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: O-oh! I, um... Gosh!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're always paying such close attention to me,
dear. Thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hehe... You're welcome!
